response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below threshold while our policy requires 0.95 minimum before sharing; all neighbors are energy-stressed and we must prioritize survival until our own reserve exceeds policy limits.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.95, distrusted_peers=['r4c2'].
Your latest belief: r4c2 is untrustworthy and will not reciprocate; all neighbors are energy-stressed; r4c1 must prioritize survival and reject all outbound requests until SoC exceeds 95%..
